| VISIT_DATE | Patient Visit Date | 
| FOLLOWUP_ATTESTATION | Practitioner's Attestation to Follow-up | 
| ACCURACY_ATTESTATION | Practitioner's Accuracy of Attestation | 
| RISK_SCORE | Calculated ASCVD Risk Score | 
| BASELINE_SCORE | Patient's Baseline ASCVD Score | 
| BASELINE_GROUP | Patient's Baseline Group (Low, Medium, High) | 
| BASELINE_DATE | Patient's Baseline Date | 
| INSERT_DATE | Date the Record was Created | 
| LAST_MODIFIED_DATE | Date the Patient Record was Modified |
